title: Mamdani emerges as kingmaker, and other takeaways from Tuesday’s primaries
description: Democratic socialist candidates won key races in New York, while more establishment candidates prevailed in other contests.

title: Mamdani-backed candidates sweep House primaries in NYC. See live results.
description: Three left-wing hopefuls backed by New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani won their races, including two who unseated incumbents.

title: Why are crisis pregnancy centers saying they can 'rule out' ectopic pregnancy?
description: Under President Trump, more federal attention and support has gone towards anti-abortion Christian centers. A watchdog group says many of them mislead patients with promises to "rule out" ectopic pregnancies.

title: Morning news brief
description: Trump to meet with Senate Republicans Wednesday, Congress passes largest housing affordability bill in decades, Democrats face questions about the party's future after New York primary results.

title: Congress passes the largest housing affordability bill in decades
description: The most expansive affordable housing legislation in decades has passed both chambers of Congress and is now headed for a presidential signature.

title: Rep. Mike Lawler, R-N.Y., on Congress passing housing affordability bill
description: NPR's A Martinez speaks with Republican Congressman Mike Lawler of New York, co-sponsor of the bi-partisan housing legislation that passed Congress Tuesday night.

title: Rep. Jim Himes, D-Conn., on Trump's pick for acting national intelligence director
description: NPR's Michel Martin asks Democratic Rep. Jim Himes of Connecticut about President Trump's appointment of Bill Pulte as acting director of national intelligence.

title: Appeals court allows Trump administration expanded use of speedy deportations
description: A federal appeals court on Tuesday allowed the Trump administration to resume carrying out speedy deportations of undocumented migrants throughout the United States, not just near the border.

title: Mamdani's political gamble pays off as his endorsed candidates sweep their primaries
description: All three progressive candidates backed by New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani — including two who took on Democratic incumbents — won their primaries in safe seats almost guaranteeing their election in November.

title: Supreme Court says Rastafarian can’t sue prison officials over shorn dreadlocks
description: The ruling dealt with legal technicalities but is a departure from a series of decisions by the justices expanding religious freedoms in recent terms.

title: Senate passes war powers resolution, Tim Kaine says there's more work to be done
description: The Senate has voted to take away President Trump's power to wage war with Iran. NPR's Scott Detrow speaks with Virginia Democrat Tim Kaine, a sponsor of the bill.

title: Tension builds between Trump and Senate Republicans, putting GOP agenda on the line
description: Divides over what GOP priorities should be ahead of this fall's midterm elections are testing the relationship between President Trump and Senate Republicans.

title: In symbolic vote, Congress directs Trump to remove forces from Iran war
description: The measure to remove U.S. armed forces from hostilities with Iran does not require the president's signature, nor does it carry the force of law. But it reflects bipartisan frustration with the war.

title: Trump supporter’s company pledges $1 million to fix White House lawn after UFC event
description: Ohio-based ScottsMiracle-Gro said it is donating “a combination of monetary and product support.” A government watchdog said the arrangement raises ethics questions.
